title: Kanban pipeline
description: See every application at a glance. Drag cards between stages as your applications move from Applied to Accepted.

title: Nothing to configure
description: Focus on applying: No complicated setup, no wrestling with formatting, no onboarding wizard to click through.

title: Your data belongs to you
description: Miss the spreadsheets? Download your data to a CSV and take it with you. As easy as texting your ex.
